title: Mens Rea Reform Act of 2025
stage_label: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute by the Yeas and Nays: 15 - 13.
crs_summary: Mens Rea Reform Act of 2025 This bill establishes a default mens rea standard (i.e., state of mind requirement) for federal criminal offenses—statutory and regulatory—that lack an explicit standard. The government must generally prove that a defendant acted knowingly with respect to each element of an offense for which the text does not specify a state of mind.
last_action_text: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute by the Yeas and Nays: 15 - 13.
